usage: backup.py [-h] --source SOURCE --dest DEST [--compress {none,gzip,zstd}] [--threads THREADS] [--dry-run]

options:
  -h, --help                         show this help message and exit
  --source SOURCE                    input source directory
  --dest DEST                        destination backup file
  --compress {none,gzip,zstd}        compression mode
  --threads THREADS                  worker thread count
  --dry-run                          print commands without writing files
  --exclude PATTERN                  exclude paths matching pattern
